ue strings read in by loadFromFile() or added by put(). The file is written alphabetically by key. This uses Properties.store() to save the file. Returns: true for success, false for error opening file. Errors are printed to System.out. getDoubl

file. Errors are printed to System.out. getDouble public java.lang.Double getDouble (java.lang.String key) Return the value of the preferences with the given key, parsing the value as a Double. If the preference with the key is absent, or the va

the preference with the key is absent, or the value cannot be interpreted as a double, return null. If the value cannot be parsed, this prints a warning to System.out. For the key, you can use provided String constants such as STAGE_X. Parameter
